mapper.sql:
FROM todos t
JOIN todo_tags tt ON tt.todo_id = t.id AND tt.user_id = t.user_id AND tt.tag_id = #{tagId}
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT t.*
ORDER BY t.updated_at DESC
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.due_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, t.due_at ASC, t.updated_at DESC
ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.status = 'TODO' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN t.due_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, t.due_at ASC, t.updated_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
